headline: How Avery Dennison’s RFID Supply-Chain Push Will Impact Avery Dennison (AVY) Investors
summary: Avery Dennison recently advanced its RFID technology to better support global supply chains, reinforcing its role in labeling, adhesive, and digital identification solutions, and in late April 2026 it plans to host its first-quarter earnings call following the morning release of results. This focus on smarter RFID-enabled labeling underscores how Avery Dennison is embedding itself deeper into the infrastructure that connects materials, products, and data across industries. We’ll now examine...
